event_info.name: LovHack 2026
event_info.motto: No fluff. No filler. Just building.
event_info.description: LovHack is a 48-hour online hackathon built for one goal: shipping real web apps fast. Participants ideate, design, and build production-ready web applications using modern tools and AI-assisted workflows. Whether you are new to building or an experienced developer, LovHack is designed to help you turn ideas into working products under real time constraints.

format.team_options: Teams and solo builders are both welcome
format.experience_level: Open to both newcomers and experienced developers

judging_criteria.description: Teams and solo builders compete to create the most impressive applications based on execution, creativity, and usability.

prizes.description: Platform credits for top projects, public recognition, and long-term visibility within the Lovable builder community.

focus.main: Building production-ready web applications using modern tools and AI-assisted workflows

faq.question: What is LovHack?
faq.answer: LovHack 2026 is a 48-hour online hackathon designed for developers and web app builders. The goal is to ship real web applications using modern tools and AI-assisted workflows. No fluff. No filler. Just building.

faq.question: When did/does LovHack take place?
faq.answer: LovHack 2026 ran from January 2, 2026 at 8:00 AM CST to January 4, 2026 at 8:00 AM CST (48 hours total). The event has already concluded.

faq.question: Is LovHack free?
faq.answer: Yes! LovHack is completely free to participate. General admission is $0 USD.

faq.question: Can I participate solo or do I need a team?
faq.answer: Both! LovHack welcomes solo builders as well as teams. You can participate however you prefer.

faq.question: Is LovHack online or in-person?
faq.answer: LovHack is a fully online/virtual hackathon. You can participate from anywhere.

faq.question: Do I need experience to join?
faq.answer: No! LovHack is designed for both newcomers and experienced developers. Whether you're just starting out or have years of experience, you're welcome to participate.

faq.question: How are projects judged?
faq.answer: Projects are judged on three main criteria: 1) Execution quality, 2) Creativity, and 3) Usability.

faq.question: What are the prizes?
faq.answer: Top projects receive platform credits, public recognition, and long-term visibility within the Lovable builder community.

faq.question: What should I build?
faq.answer: You should build a production-ready web application using modern tools and AI-assisted workflows. The focus is on shipping real, functional apps.

faq.question: How do I register?
faq.answer: Registration was available through the Luma event page at luma.com/znhtmdf3 and the official website lovhack.dev. The event has already concluded with 243 participants registered.

faq.question: Who organized LovHack?
faq.answer: LovHack was organized by Karthik Uppala and the LovHack team.

faq.question: Where can I find the community?
faq.answer: Join the LovHack Discord community at discord.com/invite/lovhack and follow on Twitter @lovaborhq.

faq.question: What tools can I use?
faq.answer: LovHack encourages using modern development tools and AI-assisted workflows to build web applications. You're free to use whatever tools help you ship a great product.

faq.question: What is the website?
faq.answer: The official LovHack website is https://lovhack.dev
